title: Lesson - How to record a pitch

sections.content:
[This is a Sample based on Recording a call in MS Teams. This could be done with any Video Recording tool and uploaded to any Video Library for hosting and getting a URL to access]


Record your call in MS Teams

{Step in Salesforce: click link to Teams}
  1. This takes you directly to the Teams channel for Stand and Delivers.
  2. Click Meet.
  3. Click Join Now. (You may want to double check your audio and video settings, and you can give your meeting a name if you like.)
  4. Share your screen or pull up materials as needed for the assignment. When you’re ready, start the recording. You can start speaking as soon the recording is going.
  5. When you’re done, just hit Leave. The recording will populate in Teams. First, you’ll see a message, “Recording has stopped. Saving recording...” Then, the recording will appear. Click the three dots, Get Link, copy the link, and head back to Salesforce.
  6. If I don’t like my recording, I just follow the steps again and copy the new link.


Important: Hit Record on your Teams call! End meeting when done
